chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2477 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on Misc. No.11217/2020 (Urgency): 2. For order on Misc. No.11218/2020 (Exemption): 3. For order on Misc. No.11219/2020 (Stay): 4. For hearing of main case: 14.05.2020: Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, advocate for the petitioner. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. The petitioner has impugned notification dated 21.04.2020 (page 17) whereby he has been repatriated to his parent department viz. SGA&CD, Government of Sindh, with immediate effect. It is contended that the case of the petitioner, who was serving as Assistant Secretary in BS-17 at the time of issuance of the impugned notification, was not covered by the order passed by this Court on 07.04.2020 in C.P. No.D-6431/2019 as well as the orders of the Honourable Supreme Court mentioned in the impugned notification. It is urged that in view of the above, the petitioner could not be repatriated to his parent department. Issue notice to the respondents as well as to learned Advocate General Sindh for 29.05.2020 at 10:00 a.m. JUDGE JUDGE
